body.title: Granny: revert CC.0 to tmux_send_keys — Dovecot not installed
body.result: config revert committed in 04f73c58; Dovecot setup is prerequisite for bus dispatch
body.intention: I intend that the Dovecot installation is a prerequisite before re-enabling bus dispatch.
body.close_note: Committed in 04f73c58 as incidental — bus dispatch requires Dovecot installation first
body.description:
Reverted dispatch: bus → tmux_send_keys in config/granny.yaml. Bus dispatch requires Dovecot IMAP which is not yet installed on this machine.

**Affected files:** config/granny.yaml
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** Config revert only
**Completion criteria:** granny.yaml has tmux_send_keys for CC.0
